rows.description: Dec. 11. To Mr Davenport on Acct. of the Vicarage Estate Aug. 17. 1824 at Hillington - see coll. Register p.347. - July 4- -
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description is a combination based on visual verification. 'Dec. 11.' is present from gemini-flash. The location is 'Hillington' (gemini-flash correct) not 'Kidlington' (gpt-5-mini incorrect). gemini-flash's capture of the braced, multi-line sub-text is more complete.

rows.description: 3. To Mr Heyes. Improved Stip. for Merton Nov. 1824

All extractors agreed on all fields. Value used as consensus.

rows.description: Jan. 31. Subscription to St Clement's Church -----
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it correctly captures 'St Clement's' (without a period after St) and the trailing dashes '-----', as observed visually.

rows.description: Feb. 15. C.o for a Cottage grate in the Porter's lodge. 13.6. and a fixed Bedstead in Do. 2.2.0. -----
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash for its accuracy. gpt-5-mini's notes revealed a misinterpretation of the sub-amounts ('13s 6d and 2s 2d' vs actual '13.6.' and '2.2.0.' which correctly sum to £2 15s 6d). Visually confirmed 'C.o' and the specific numerical notation for sub-items and trailing dashes.

rows.description: March 6. To J. Maffey. for four Months Service at the Porter's Lodge
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it includes the period after 'Maffey' and proper capitalization of 'Lodge', as observed visually.
